evidence: standards/enterprise/mobile-security.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: Pinning or another trust-policy deviation requires human Security authority, threat-model rationale, backup and rotation plan, outage recovery, owner, expiry, and removal decision.
statement: Network clients use platform hostname and certificate trust evaluation, never trust-all behavior; any approved pinning adds explicit backup, rotation, expiry, outage-recovery, and removal controls.
